/usr/bin/c++ -ffunction-sections -Wall  -maes -msse2 -msse4.1 -mpclmul -Wfatal-errors -fPIC -Wno-ignored-attributes -std=c++14 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libdroidcrypto.dylib -install_name @rpath/libdroidcrypto.dylib CMakeFiles/droidcrypto.dir/AES.cpp.o CMakeFiles/droidcrypto.dir/PRNG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/droidcrypto.dir/Defines.cpp.o
